calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kimberly Barrientos, Esq. 877-285-4933 Zee Law Group for Assignee COLLECT ACCESS LLC.
Gareth Yep 415-335-3625 Defendant/Judgement debtor in Pro Per (In-person).

ARGUED. Ms Barrientos informs the Court of the amoount of debt. The Court inquires how mcuh Mr. Yep is willing to pay. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of GARETH YEP.

Denied. The levying officer is to withhold $500 per pay period from Mr. Gareth Yep.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
